---
name: Question
about: Ask about usage, configuration, or development
title: "[QUESTION] "
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

> 💡 **Better place for questions**: please consider asking in [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/lorenzo-giustarini/saio/discussions) instead. Discussions are easier to search and benefit other users with the same question.
>
> Use this issue template only if your question is specific to a bug or unclear behavior in the code.

## What are you trying to do?

Describe your goal in plain language.

## What have you tried?

Steps you've already taken, links to docs you've consulted.

## Where you're stuck

Specific point where things stopped working or became unclear.

## Environment

- OS + version
- SAIO version
- Install method (NSIS / .deb / .AppImage / .dmg / source)
